items.name: PARADISE LOST SCAR STITCH LONG COAT
items.description:
A MID LENGTH HOODED COAT WITH A REFINED, BODY FOLLOWING SILHOUETTE AND SUBTLY STRUCTURED SHOULDERS. CONSTRUCTED THROUGH IRREGULAR PANELING AND EXPOSED STITCH MAPPING THAT TRACES THE TORSO AND ARMS, CREATING A RAW, REASSEMBLED SURFACE. CLEAN SLEEVE LINE, FULL LENGTH CENTER ZIP CLOSURE, AND A SLIGHTLY TAPERED FALL WITH CONTROLLED VOLUME.

FW25: SACRIFICE
items.searchText:
paradise lost scar stitch long coat a mid length hooded coat with a refined, body following silhouette and subtly structured shoulders. constructed through irregular paneling and exposed stitch mapping that traces the torso and arms, creating a raw, reassembled surface. clean sleeve line, full length center zip closure, and a slightly tapered fall with controlled volume.
